home.metaDescription: Kyronet is your IT partner for designing high-performing, secure, and scalable infrastructures.

hero.title: Your IT infrastructure, our expertise
hero.subtitle: We design, deploy, and manage tailored IT infrastructures to propel your business into the future.
hero.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

about.p1: We design and manage modern IT ecosystems including networks, virtualization, and secure cloud infrastructures for organizations that demand performance and reliability.
about.p2: From network architecture to business continuity, we ensure scalability, resilience, and security at every layer of your information system.

services.intro: A structured approach to design and manage modern infrastructures.

office.title: End-user computing
office.description: Full lifecycle management of your IT equipment, rollout, and continuous monitoring.

managed.title: Managed services & support
managed.description: Proactive maintenance and technical assistance to keep your services running smoothly.

netsec.title: Networking & cybersecurity
netsec.description: Advanced protection for your infrastructure and hardening of critical systems.

hoom.title: HOOM
hoom.description: HOOM is an innovative learning platform that helps students revise with interactive quizzes, past papers, course summaries, and smart AI assistance.

hotelpro.title: HotelPro
hotelpro.description: HotelPro is a full hotel management platform for reservations, rooms, billing, restaurant operations, and accounting.

restaurant.title: RestoPro
restaurant.description: RestoPro is a complete restaurant management solution: dashboard, order taking, checkout, digital menu with QR code, inventory, recipes, supplier purchasing, credit customers, and accounting.

hotelproPage.title: HotelPro
hotelproPage.subtitle: Hotel & restaurant management, unified.
hotelproPage.description: HotelPro is a complete hotel and restaurant management platform: rooms, reservations, point of sale, inventory, and accounting all in one tool, with configurable roles and permissions for each team.
hotelproPage.modulesSubtitle: Each team gets exactly the tools they need, nothing more, nothing less.

modules.title: Accommodation
modules.description: The heart of the hotel: rooms, reservations, and stays tracked in real-time.

modules.title: Restaurant
modules.description: A complete point of sale, linked to the public menu accessible via QR code.

modules.title: Inventory & Purchases
modules.description: Ingredients, suppliers, and purchase orders tracked to never run out of stock.

modules.title: Finance & Accounting
modules.description: Integrated accounting, from the cash receipt to the monthly report.

modules.title: Administration
modules.description: Configurable roles and permissions without touching the code.

modules.title: Configuration
modules.description: Settings that adapt the application to each establishment.

restaurantPage.title: RestoPro
restaurantPage.subtitle: Restaurant management, simplified.
restaurantPage.description: RestoPro is a complete restaurant management platform: dashboard, order taking, checkout, menu and combos, inventory and recipes, supplier purchasing, credit customers, and accounting, all in one tool, with a public QR-code menu and configurable roles for each cashier.
restaurantPage.modulesSubtitle: From the dashboard to accounting, every team gets exactly the tools it needs.

modules.title: Dashboard
modules.description: A real-time overview of restaurant activity, from revenue to best-selling dishes.
features: Sales chart (day / week / month / year / custom range)

modules.title: Orders & Checkout
modules.description: Fast order taking, checkout, and automatically printed tickets.

modules.title: Menu & Combos
modules.description: Menu, category, and combo management, with a public QR-code menu.

modules.title: Inventory & Recipes
modules.description: Ingredients, stock movements, and recipe costs tracked in real time.

modules.title: Purchasing & Suppliers
modules.description: Suppliers, purchase orders, and invoices tracked from order to payment.

modules.title: Clients & Credit
modules.description: Track credit customers from invoicing to payment, so no receivable slips through.

modules.title: Finance & Accounting
modules.description: Integrated accounting, from expenses to the monthly report.

modules.title: Administration
modules.description: Cashiers, roles, and permissions, plus settings specific to each restaurant.

testimonials.subtitle: Organizations that trust us with their mission-critical infrastructure.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.text: Outstanding technical expertise. Their approach completely transformed our IT infrastructure.

items.name: Michael Brown
items.text: Reliability, performance, and security. The team delivered a robust, scalable architecture.

items.name: David Martin
items.text: A true strategic partner. They understand both business and technical challenges.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our IT services.

items.question: What are your response times?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 coverage with sub-15-minute response for critical incidents.

items.question: Do you offer a free audit?
items.answer: Yes. We perform a full, free infrastructure audit with a detailed report and concrete recommendations.

items.question: How do you ensure security?
items.answer: We use Zero Trust architectures, next-generation firewalls, encryption, and continuous monitoring across systems.

items.question: Which technologies do you work with?
items.answer: VMware, Kubernetes, Cisco, Fortinet, AWS, Azure, plus custom solutions in Python, PHP, and Go.

items.question: Are backups secure?
items.answer: Yes. We follow the 3-2-1 rule with immutable backups and regular restore testing.

contact.intro: We design high-performing, secure, and scalable IT infrastructures for modern organizations.

dev.intro: Our developers build tailored tools to automate repetitive work and connect your systems.

process.intro: From strategic analysis to ongoing support, every step is designed to build an infrastructure that is performant, reliable, and scalable.
